subcodes.first_line: O descendant of the Ancient Beloved and long-cherished companion, thy noble father in the Iraq days in the presence of the Day-Star of the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حبیب قدیم و رفیق دیرین من پدر بزرگوار در ایام عراق بحضور نیر آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
